auth.name: Name
auth.loginSubtitle: Open the cleaning board with the same staff name and password used for your shift.
auth.readyForShiftTitle: Built for the start of a shift
auth.readyForShiftText: Sign in, check assigned rooms, and keep the team board current from a phone.
auth.loginErrorInvalid: The staff name or password is not correct.
auth.loginErrorFailed: The board could not be opened. Check the connection and try again.
auth.registerHint: Create a staff login with the admin password.
auth.accessHelpText: Reset a forgotten password with manager approval.
auth.registerSubtitle: Create a staff login for a cleaner or manager who needs access to the daily housekeeping board.
auth.registerPanelText: New accounts require the admin password so the room board stays limited to the hotel team.
auth.resetPasswordSubtitle: Set a new staff password with manager approval so the cleaner can return to the shift board.
auth.resetPanelText: The admin password is required before a staff password can be changed.
auth.installAppMessage: Keep the board on the home screen so cleaners can open it without searching the browser.

setup.title: Plan Setup
setup.confirmOverride: Saving will override the current plan for {date}. Continue?

board.title: Cleaning Board
board.editHint: Update room type, guests, and priority
board.noPlanHint: Create today’s plan before cleaners start the shift.

settings.title: Settings
settings.whatsappChatLinkHint: Optional. If set, the app opens this WhatsApp chat/group link instead of using the phone number.
settings.whatsappAllowAfterCleaned: Allow opening WhatsApp even when room is already cleaned
settings.clearPlanConfirm: Enter your password to clear today's plan:
settings.notificationsDeniedHint: Open browser settings → Site settings → Notifications → Allow for this site
settings.notificationsUnsupported: Notifications are not supported on this device
settings.installAppHint: Use the browser menu if the install button is unavailable.
settings.installAppIosHint: In Safari, tap Share and then Add to Home Screen.
